description: A cattle breeder has taken a tissue sample from a prize bull and needs to submit it to a lab for genetic testing.

nodes.task_description: Identify the animal the sample was taken from.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct bull from the database.

nodes.task_description: Select the desired genetic tests to be performed (e.g., parentage verification, genetic defect screening).

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the correct panel of tests.

nodes.task_description: Generate a lab submission form with all the required animal and test information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a printable PDF submission form.
